recent_announcements.summary: Nestle India Limited has informed the Exchange that Record date for the purpose of Dividend  is 10-Jul-2026. |SUBJECT: Record Date

Mastek Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated July 03, 2026, titled "Press Release titled  Mastek Featured in  100 Years in Monarchy and Democracy  Publication for Contributions to the United Kingdom ". |SUBJECT: Press Release

Nestle India Limited has informed the Exchange that Board of Directors at its meeting held on July 03, 2026, declared Special Dividend 2026 of Rs. 2 per equity share, to be paid out of the retained earnings of the Company. |SUBJECT: Dividend

Hyundai Motor India Limited has informed the Exchange about Certificate under SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018 for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. |SUBJECT: Certificate under SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018
